---
title: "AYU - Individual Week 3"
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
editor: visual
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, eval = FALSE)
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Instruction**: *Scan your answer into pdf/word document then submit to Canvas.*

---

## Question

Given the following time series.

| t   | $y_t$ |
|:----|:------|
| 1   | 1     |
| 2   | 3     |
| 3   | 5     |
| 4   | 8     |
| 5   | 12    |
| 6   | 13    |
| 7   | 16    |
| 8   | 20    |
| 9   | 25    |
| 10   | 30    |

a. Use simple exponential smoothing to forecast the values of $y_{11}$

b. Use double exponential smoothing to forecast the values of $y_{11}$

c. Use triple exponential smoothing (Holt-Winters Method) to forecast the values of $y_{11}$

------------------------------------------------------------------------
